summary: First test run of 24 Hour Clipping MVP. Full backend suite (28 pytest cases) and full frontend E2E flows executed: landing, customer create->fund->bid room->contract-live overlay->clip room, seeded clip room (contract-1), seeded rescue mode (contract-5), delivery review + approve (contract-4) with 8% fee/payout breakdown verified; clipper dashboard, place bid, clipper room, onboarding invite CLIP24 through approval-pending + demo skip; admin console with stats/rescue alert/trigger-rescue/suspend/tabs; marketplace, directory, clipper profile; AI concierge streaming + generate-brief. Reset demo between destructive phases.

issues: Radix DialogContent renders without DialogTitle/Description — surfaces a11y console errors: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for the component to be accessible for screen reader users.' Wrap titles with @radix-ui/react-visually-hidden VisuallyHidden or add aria-describedby.

action_items: OPTIONAL a11y: Add VisuallyHidden <DialogTitle>/<DialogDescription> to Dialog modals in BidRoom.jsx and DeliveryReview.jsx to silence Radix console warnings and improve screen-reader UX.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has clean structure but is 425 lines — acceptable now; if more endpoints are added, split into routers/ai.py, routers/contracts.py, routers/projects.py.
AI streaming uses emergentintegrations correctly; StreamDone break is good. Consider capturing full LLM error stack in logs (currently only logs message).

seed.py hard-codes clipper-1..6 and contract-1..7 IDs — fine for demo but coupled to frontend which references contract-1..5 & clipper-1 directly (ClipperDashboard ME='clipper-1'). Acceptable for MVP.
Frontend Dialog modals lack DialogTitle — Radix logs a11y errors on every open (see design_issues).
No pagination on GET /api/projects (limit 200) or /api/contracts (limit 100) — fine for demo scale.
test_credentials: No login required. Clipper invite code: CLIP24. Role switcher via navbar data-testid role-switcher.
seed_data_creation: Used existing /api/demo/reset endpoint between destructive phases (customer flow + clipper deliver + admin rescue). All seeded IDs contract-1..7 and project-1..8 confirmed present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully verified via /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (28 tests, all pass, ~7s excluding AI which is ~40s). AI chat streaming and AI brief both work with real LLM (Emergent key) — budget 2 LLM calls per full run. Frontend E2E across all data-testids works. Only minor issue: Radix DialogTitle a11y warnings (non-blocking). Full customer journey (create->fund->bid->accept->contract-live overlay->clip-room) works end-to-end; realtime adapter spawns simulated bids within ~5s. Clipper onboarding portfolio upload input has class='hidden' — use page.set_input_files (playwright accepts hidden inputs) but DO NOT wait_for_selector visible; use state='attached'. Reset demo (/api/demo/reset) between destructive test phases.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Only one minor a11y console warning from Radix Dialog usage; no functional impact.
